title: CT9 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} → CT9.Graph.Edge capability input CT9.Graph.NodeId.entry CT9.Graph.NodeId.partition

internalDeclarations.type: Type (max (uAmbient + 1) (uBranch + 1))
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.Problem
internalDeclarations.docString:
Mathematical data shared by every tactic in one structural-exhaustion
proof instance.

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT9.Capability P → Type uItem
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Capability.Item

internalDeclarations.type: Type u → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.OrderedCollection
internalDeclarations.docString:
A finite ordered collection, without the claim that it contains every
inhabitant of its element type.

This is intentionally a duplicate-free list rather than a `Finset`: first-hit
machine semantics consume its order.  All set-like reasoning should pass
through Mathlib's `List`/`Finset` API instead of adding another collection
implementation here.

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} → Core.BranchContext P → Core.OrderedCollection capability.Item → CT9.Input capability
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Input.mk

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.OrderedCollection.values

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → List α → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult
internalDeclarations.docString: Search evidence relative to an arbitrary finite list.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (α → Prop) → Type u
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result
internalDeclarations.docString: The result of exhaustive search over an exact finite universe.

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.Result p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → (xs : List α) → (p : α → Prop) → ((value : α) → Decidable (p value)) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (enumeration : FinEnum α) (p : α → Prop),
  (∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) → ∀ (value : α), ¬p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (enumeration : FinEnum α) →
    (p : α → Prop) →
      (motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p → Sort u_2) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult enumeration.orderedValues p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((absentProof : ∀ value ∈ enumeration.orderedValues, ¬p value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent absentProof)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.search.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} → CT9.BoundedCertificate capability input → CT9.Decision capability input

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} → CT9.OverloadResidual capability input → CT9.Decision capability input

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      (label : capability.Label) →
        capability.capacity label < CT9.fibreCount capability input label → CT9.OverloadResidual capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.OverloadResidual.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} {capability : CT9.Capability P} {input : CT9.Input capability},
  (∀ (label : capability.Label), CT9.fibreCount capability input label ≤ capability.capacity label) →
    CT9.BoundedCertificate capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.BoundedCertificate.mk

internalDeclarations.type: CT9.Graph.NodeId
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.NodeId.overloadedTerminal

internalDeclarations.type: Type
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.NodeId

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent

internalDeclarations.type: {α : Type u} → {xs : List α} → {p : α → Prop} → (value : α) → value ∈ xs → p value → Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = some value → decide (p value) = true
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)) (value : α),
  decide (p value) = true → p value
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_2

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {α : Type u_1} (xs : List α) (p : α → Prop) (decideP : (value : α) → Decidable (p value)),
  List.find? (fun value => decide (p value)) xs = none → ∀ value ∈ xs, p value → False
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList._proof_3

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u_1} →
  (motive : Option α → Sort u_2) →
    (x : Option α) → ((value : α) → x = some value → motive (some value)) → (x = none → motive none) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.onList.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        (t : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p) →
          ((value : α) →
              (member : value ∈ xs) →
                (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
            ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent none)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (capability : CT9.Capability P) → CT9.Input capability → capability.Label → ℕ

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {xs : List α} →
    {p : α → Prop} →
      {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p → Sort u_1} →
        ((value : α) →
            (member : value ∈ xs) →
              (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.found value member holds)) →
          ((none : ∀ value ∈ xs, ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult.absent none)) →
            (t : Core.FiniteSearch.ListResult xs p) → motive t

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      (terminal : CT9.Graph.Terminal) →
        CT9.Graph.Path capability input CT9.Graph.NodeId.entry terminal.nodeId →
          CT9.Outcome capability input terminal → CT9.ExecutionResult capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.ExecutionResult.mk

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((a a_2 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) →
                (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_2) → CT9.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
              motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.brecOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT9.Capability P) →
    (input : CT9.Input capability) →
      {a b : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.trace._f

internalDeclarations.type:
(motive : CT9.Graph.Terminal → Sort u_1) →
  (x : CT9.Graph.Terminal) →
    (Unit → motive CT9.Graph.Terminal.overloaded) → (Unit → motive CT9.Graph.Terminal.bounded) → motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.instReprTerminal.repr.match_1

          ((residual : CT9.OverloadResidual capability input) → motive (CT9.Decision.overloaded residual)) →

{P : Core.Problem} →

        {a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId} → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort (max (uLabel + 1) u)
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.below

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((a a_2 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) →
                (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_2) → CT9.Graph.Path.below t → motive a a_2 t) →
              motive a a_1 t ×' CT9.Graph.Path.below t

{P : Core.Problem} →

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT9.Capability P) →
    (input : CT9.Input capability) →
      (motive : (b a : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a b → Sort u_5) →
        (b a : CT9.Graph.NodeId) →
          (x : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a b) →
            ((n : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → motive n n (CT9.Graph.Path.nil n)) →
              ((b a b_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) →
                  (e : CT9.Graph.Edge capability input a b_1) →
                    (rest : CT9.Graph.Path capability input b_1 b) → motive b a (CT9.Graph.Path.cons e rest)) →
                motive b a x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.trace.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{motive : CT9.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →

internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Terminal.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (capability : CT9.Capability P) (input : CT9.Input capability),
  (∀ (value : capability.Label), ¬capability.capacity value < CT9.fibreCount capability input value) →
    CT9.BoundedCertificate capability input
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.analyze._proof_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (capability : CT9.Capability P) →
    (input : CT9.Input capability) →
      (motive :
          (Core.FiniteSearch.Result fun label => capability.capacity label < CT9.fibreCount capability input label) →
            Sort u_5) →
        (x : Core.FiniteSearch.Result fun label => capability.capacity label < CT9.fibreCount capability input label) →
          ((label : capability.Label) →
              (overloaded : capability.capacity label < CT9.fibreCount capability input label) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found label overloaded)) →
            ((noOverload :
                  ∀ (value : capability.Label), ¬capability.capacity value < CT9.fibreCount capability input value) →
                motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent noOverload)) →
              motive x
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.analyze.match_1

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      {motive : CT9.Decision capability input → Sort u} →
        (t : CT9.Decision capability input) →
          ((residual : CT9.OverloadResidual capability input) → motive (CT9.Decision.overloaded residual)) →
            ((certificate : CT9.BoundedCertificate capability input) → motive (CT9.Decision.bounded certificate)) →
              motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Decision.casesOn

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        ((node : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT9.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
          ({a b c : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →
              (a_1 : CT9.Graph.Edge capability input a b) →
                (a_2 : CT9.Graph.Path capability input b c) →
                  motive b c a_2 → motive a c (CT9.Graph.Path.cons a_1 a_2)) →
            {a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId} → (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) → motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.rec

internalDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {capability : CT9.Capability P} →
    {input : CT9.Input capability} →
      {motive : (a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1 → Sort u} →
        {a a_1 : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →
          (t : CT9.Graph.Path capability input a a_1) →
            ((node : CT9.Graph.NodeId) → motive node node (CT9.Graph.Path.nil node)) →
              ({a b c : CT9.Graph.NodeId} →
                  (a_2 : CT9.Graph.Edge capability input a b) →
                    (a_3 : CT9.Graph.Path capability input b c) → motive a c (CT9.Graph.Path.cons a_2 a_3)) →
                motive a a_1 t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT9.Graph.Path.casesOn

{motive : CT9.Graph.Terminal → Sort u} →

    {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.Result p → Sort u_1} →

        ((value : α) → (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found value holds)) →
          ((none : ∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent none)) → motive t
internalDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.Core.FiniteSearch.Result.casesOn

{P : Core.Problem} →

internalDeclarations.type:
{α : Type u} →
  {p : α → Prop} →
    {motive : Core.FiniteSearch.Result p → Sort u_1} →
      ((value : α) → (holds : p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.found value holds)) →
        ((none : ∀ (value : α), ¬p value) → motive (Core.FiniteSearch.Result.absent none)) →
          (t : Core.FiniteSearch.Result p) → motive t
